instruction: Please push the escalation update to #general on discord. Fix the path if needed, review what's already on the board, the next step may already be on the board, so leave it alone if it is there, if the target is shared, leave a short live block on the calendar, and send leadership@example.com a recap.

solution_commands: openclaw message send --channel discord --target #general --message 'Escalation update posted and being tracked.'
email send --to leadership@example.com --subject 'Escalation delivery recap' --body 'The delivery path is recovered and the update is posted.'
